mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders(user_id, product_id, status, create_time) VALUES( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, IFNULL(#{createTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, status, create_time FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, product_id, status, create_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
